name: upliftcontrolversion
description: Uplift's own playbook for wiring a repo so every deploy auto-bumps a git tag (vX.Y.Z), bakes it into the artifact, shows it to humans (UI label or /version API), and keeps OTEL_SERVICE_VERSION from drifting off a hardcoded value. Documents the real convention used across Uplift's frontend (Next.js/Docker) and backend (Bun/Elysia/ECS) repos.
